---
name: Player Experience Issue
about: Report a bug, inconsistency, confusing flow, or rough UX from the player point of view
title: "Player Experience: "
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Problem
<!--
Describe the issue in plain language.

Examples:
- "The UI feels inconsistent between screens."
- "On mobile the layout feels like the desktop version squeezed down."
- "I could not tell whether combat had actually started."
-->

## What were you trying to do?
<!--
Describe the action or goal.

Examples:
- start combat
- assign a character
- check inventory
- use the app on mobile
-->

## What happened instead?
<!--
Describe what you saw.

Examples:
- layout overlapped
- button was hard to find
- screen looked inconsistent
- nothing seemed to happen
-->

## Why this feels bad
<!--
Describe the impact on your experience.

Examples:
- confusing
- hard to read
- hard to use on mobile
- looks inconsistent
- feels buggy even if it technically works
-->

## Desired outcome
<!--
Describe what better should feel like from a user perspective.

Examples:
- "This should feel more consistent."
- "Mobile should get a mobile-friendly layout."
- "It should be obvious when the game is disconnected."
-->

## Screenshots or video
<!-- Add screenshots, recordings, or mockups if you have them. -->

## Device / viewport
<!--
Fill in what you know. Delete anything that does not apply.

- Platform: [ ] Desktop  [ ] Mobile  [ ] Tablet
- Browser: [ ] Chrome  [ ] Firefox  [ ] Safari  [ ] Edge  [ ] Other
- Screen size or device: __________
- Orientation: [ ] Portrait  [ ] Landscape  [ ] N/A
-->

## Area affected
<!--
Pick one or more if known.

- [ ] Onboarding / Login
- [ ] Combat
- [ ] Team
- [ ] Inventory
- [ ] Gacha
- [ ] General UI
- [ ] Other: __________
-->

## Frequency
<!--
Pick one if known.

- [ ] Always
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Once
- [ ] Not sure
-->

## References
<!--
Add any useful links.

Examples:
- related issue
- screenshot
- design reference
- relevant screen or file path
-->

## Technical notes
<!--
Optional. Leave blank if you do not know.

Examples:
- possible affected file
- design direction
- API or WebSocket message involved
- suspected regression
-->

## Acceptance criteria
<!--
List user-visible outcomes that should be true when this is fixed.

Examples:
- The layout is usable on mobile without showing the desktop structure squeezed down.
- Buttons and cards use a more consistent visual treatment.
- The disconnected state is obvious and understandable.
-->

## Non-goals
<!--
Optional. Note anything this issue should not turn into.

Examples:
- "Do not rewrite the whole frontend."
- "Do not redesign unrelated screens."
-->
